hypothesis: Incorporating electron beam dose rate as a dynamic conditioning variable during SAM-EM fine-tuning—by generating synthetic training data that explicitly pairs time-varying dose rate sequences with their corresponding SNR degradation patterns—will enable the model to predict segmentation confidence as a function of instantaneous beam dose, thereby providing a real-time signal that can autonomously trigger closed-loop adjustments to dose rate during LPTEM acquisition to maintain optimal tracking fidelity without user intervention.
